svg.title: Biza platform architecture — content hierarchy
svg.desc: Full hierarchy from categories down to chapters, showing free vs pro gating and dynamic expandability

g.text: biza.co.ke — online income education for young Kenyans
Overview · what you'll learn · estimated time · difficulty tag · free preview badge

svg.text: LESSONS (modules within the course · flexible count · not fixed at 7)
...as many lessons as the topic needs
CHAPTERS (content units inside a lesson · flexible count)
05, 06, 07... as many chapters as the lesson needs. No cap.
· 1–2 free chapters per lesson to give a taste
Every tier is dynamic — categories, opportunities, lessons, chapters all live in DB. No hardcoded counts.
